description: Provenance script incorrectly identified 72 gene columns (actual: 66) and classified data as linear scale due to OS.time contamination
evidence: OS.time column (max=5925) treated as gene expression; actual gene max=20.1
impact: Manuscript reported wrong column count, scale, and missing value count
correction: Fixed metadata column detection in 01_data_provenance.R. Reran provenance.

description: Expression scale incorrectly reported as linear with log2(x+1) applied; data was already log2
evidence: Gene expression values: 0-20.1, median 10.76, 9.6% zeros — classic log2(norm_count+1) signature
impact: Manuscript methods section was scientifically incorrect
correction: Corrected provenance assessment. No log2 applied (max<100 check prevented double transform). Manuscript corrected.

description: Condition and cohort perfectly confounded: all KIRP from TCGA, all Normal from GTEx
evidence: Design matrix rank=2 < 3 columns. Zero cells in condition×study cross-tabulation.
impact: KIRP vs GTEx contrast conflates tumor biology with cohort effects
correction: Documented as structural limitation. Added TCGA-only sensitivity analysis.

description: TCGA-only sensitivity shows 60.6% directional agreement; many glycolytic genes lose significance
impact: Upregulation of glycolytic genes may be partially attributable to cohort effects
correction: Added TCGA-only analysis and volcano comparison figure

description: PCA/UMAP titles said Global Transcriptome for 66-gene panel
evidence: Titles: PCA — Global Transcriptome, UMAP — Global Transcriptome

description: Density plot saved with boxplot variable (p_box instead of p_dens)
UMAP plots referenced undefined variables bn_bg, bn_panel, bn_grid
impact: Script would have failed if UMAP was available

description: 58 missing values incorrectly attributed to gene expression data
evidence: OS column: 28 NAs (censored), OS.time: 30 NAs; gene columns: 0 NAs

description: PKM described as PKM2 isoform; gene-level RNA-seq cannot distinguish PKM1/PKM2
evidence: Gene symbol is PKM; PKM2 is one of two splice isoforms from the PKM gene
impact: Incorrect biological inference about isoform-specific functions
correction: Corrected in manuscript: Piruvato quinase M2 → Piruvato quinase

description: GSEA run on 66 genes against 352 KEGG gene sets; 287 pathways had uncalculated P-values
evidence: GSEA warnings: P-values were not calculated properly due to unbalanced gene-level statistic values
impact: GSEA results unreliable for most gene sets
correction: Documented limitation. GSEA described as panel-restricted analysis.

description: Manuscript results script had column name mismatch (variance_pct vs Variance)
evidence: Error: Tibble columns must have compatible sizes
impact: Script failed to generate manuscript results

description: UMAP Procrustes stability variable across seeds (0.703-0.926)
